Direct Entry

Health Check
Complete relevant sections for this child's age. Leave non-applicable areas blank.
Visit Context
Growth Assessment
⚡Percentiles calculated automatically from WHO Child Growth Standards (LMS method). Override any field manually if needed.
ℹ️ Enter child's DOB, assessment date and sex on the Entry tab first — percentiles will calculate automatically when you enter measurements.

Complete the Health Check and click Generate Clinical Report.

🌱 Brigance Readiness Activities
Auto-selected from today's AEDC domain scores. Two views: parent-friendly activities for the family letter, and educator reference with clinical rationale.

Export Data
Download records as a CSV spreadsheet for your data capture requirements.
💾 Records are saved automatically to this browser/device and will persist between sessions. Export regularly as a backup.

Each row contains Child ID, name, DOB, gender, assessment date, all five domain scores, outcomes (On Track / Monitoring / Further Assessment), examiner, and centre. Copy the ChildID column into your existing OECD spreadsheet to match records — parent demographic fields are already in your master spreadsheet.
